phrases.english: Let your mind wander, then build.
It's four o'clock, time for a break.
phrases.slovak: Sú štyri hodiny, čas na prestávku.
phrases.transliteration: Soo shtiri hodiny, chas na prestavku.

phrases.english: Only seven days, in a week.
Breathe in calm, breathe out stress.
Quiet your mind, feel the peace.
Let go of worries, embrace stillness.
I can do this, step by step.
Little by little, progress is made.

phrases.slovak: Učím sa, a to je dobre.
phrases.transliteration: Ucim sa, a to je dobre.

phrases.slovak: Uč sa po slovensky, hovor po slovensky.
phrases.transliteration: Uch sa po slovensk'i, hovor po slovensk'i.

phrases.slovak: Cvič každý deň, zlepšuj sa každý týždeň.
phrases.transliteration: Chvích kadží d'en, zlepšuj sa kadží t'iždeň.

phrases.english: You can do this, believe it.
Hello, where is the train station?
phrases.slovak: Dobrý deň, kde je vlaková stanica?
phrases.transliteration: Doh-bree dyen, gde yeh vlah-koh-vah stah-nee-tsah?

phrases.english: Excuse me, can I have the bill?
I would like a ticket, please.
Where can I find a taxi?
Find your center, feel the calm.
We have good times, don't we?

phrases.slovak: Pomôžte mi, prosím. Stratil/Stratila som sa.
phrases.transliteration: Pomoh-tye-teh mee, pro-seem. Stra-teel/Stra-tee-la som sah.

phrases.english: Excuse me, where is the bread?
Do you have this in blue?

phrases.slovak: Všetko je v poriadku, nebojte sa.
phrases.transliteration: Vsetko ye v poriadku, nebojte sa.

phrases.slovak: Rozšír si obzory, uč sa slovensky.
phrases.transliteration: Rozshir si obzory, uch sa slovensky.

phrases.english: Feel the ground, beneath your feet.
Listen to your body, it speaks.
Hello there, nice to meet you.

phrases.slovak: Dobrý deň, dúfam, že sa ti darí.
phrases.transliteration: Dob-ree dyen, doo-fam, zheh sah tee dah-ree.

phrases.english: Good evening, have a good night.

phrases.slovak: Často sa usmievaj, nahlas sa smej.
phrases.transliteration: Často sa usmievaj, nahlas sa smej.

phrases.slovak: Učte sa po slovensky, krok za krokom.
phrases.transliteration: Uch-te sa po slo-ven-sky, krok za kro-kom.

phrases.slovak: Hraj sa s možnosťami, nájdi kúzlo.
phrases.transliteration: Hraj sa s mož-nosť-a-mi, náj-di kú-zlo.

phrases.english: Thank you, have a nice day.

phrases.slovak: Som rád, že sme sa stretli, priateľ.
phrases.transliteration: Som rád, že sme sa stretli, priateľ.

phrases.slovak: Spoj sa s ľuďmi, zdieľaj nápady.
phrases.transliteration: Spoj sa s l'ud'mi, zd'ielay nápady.

phrases.english: My dear mother, I love you.

phrases.slovak: Neviem si predstaviť, život bez teba.
phrases.transliteration: Nev-yem si pred-stah-veet, zhi-vot bez teb-ah.

phrases.english: Brighten a day, with a kind word.
Offer a hand, if you can.
Be a friend, always be there.
When the clock strikes midnight, dreams begin.
phrases.slovak: Keď hodiny odbijú polnoc, sny sa začnú.
phrases.transliteration: Kedy hodiny odbijú polnoc, sny sa začnú.

phrases.english: Every second counts, use them wisely.
phrases.slovak: Každá sekunda sa počíta, používaj ich múdro.
phrases.transliteration: Každá sekunda sa počíta, používaj ich múdro.

phrases.english: Morning arrives, a new chance appears.
phrases.slovak: Ráno prichádza, nová šanca sa objavuje.
phrases.transliteration: Ráno prichádza, nová šanca sa objavuje.

phrases.english: Future is coming, prepare for it now.
phrases.slovak: Budúcnosť prichádza, priprav sa na ňu teraz.
phrases.transliteration: Budúcnosť prichádza, priprav sa na ňu teraz.

phrases.english: Yesterday is gone, today is your gift.
phrases.slovak: Včera je preč, dnes je tvoj dar.
phrases.transliteration: Včera je preč, dnes je tvoj dar.

phrases.english: Slow and steady, wins the race.
Good things, take time to grow.
Embrace the journey, enjoy the view.
Sing a song, make a friend.
Play your tune, share your joy.
Hum a little, feel the peace.
Dance with me, under the stars.
My new jacket, is very warm.
phrases.slovak: Moja nová bunda, je veľmi teplá.
phrases.transliteration: Moya nova bunda, ye vel'mi tepla.

phrases.english: I need trousers, for the party.
She wears a dress, so elegant.

phrases.slovak: Učte sa po slovensky, milujte život.
phrases.transliteration: Uch-te sa po slo-ven-sky, mi-luv-te zhi-vot.

phrases.english: Open a book, open your mind.
Breath in calm, breathe out tension.
Notice the air, on your skin.
This present moment, is all there is.
Let worries drift, like fallen leaves.
phrases.slovak: Nech starosti plávajú, ako opadané lístie.
phrases.transliteration: Nech starosti plavaju, ako opadane listie.

phrases.english: Unlock new worlds, one word at a time.
phrases.slovak: Odomkni nové svety, jedno slovo po druhom.
phrases.transliteration: Odomkni nove svety, jedno slovo po druhom.

phrases.slovak: Tvoja cesta do slovenčiny, začína teraz.
phrases.transliteration: Tvoja cesta do slovenčiny, začína teraz.

phrases.slovak: Odváž sa hovoriť, po slovensky dnes.
phrases.transliteration: Odvaź sa hovoriť, po slovensky dnes.

phrases.english: Open your mind, to new worlds.
Listen to your heart, it knows.
Flow like water, find your rhythm.
phrases.slovak: Teč ako voda, nájdi svoj rytmus.
phrases.transliteration: Tech ako voda, najdi svoy rytmus.

phrases.english: Can you help, me with this?

phrases.slovak: Vyčisti si zuby, cíť sa sviežo.
phrases.transliteration: Vy-čis-ti si zu-by, cíť sa svie-žo.

phrases.english: Feel the rhythm, move with it.
phrases.slovak: Cíť rytmus, hýb sa s ním.
phrases.transliteration: Tsee-t' reet-moos, heeb sa s neem.

phrases.english: Plant a seed of kindness, watch it grow.
Offer a moment, of pure understanding.
Give a gentle nod, a silent promise.
Share your light, wherever you go.
A simple gesture, means so much.
This view, is breathtaking, isn't it?
Could you, point that out, on the map?
phrases.slovak: Mohli by ste, mi to ukázať, na mape?
phrases.transliteration: Mohli by ste, mi to ukázať, na mape?

phrases.english: What time, does the museum close?
I'm looking for, a quiet cafe, please.
Is there, a local market, nearby?
phrases.slovak: Je tu, nejaký miestny trh, blízko?
phrases.transliteration: Ye tu, nejaký miestny trh, blízko?

phrases.english: May your holidays, sparkle and shine.
phrases.slovak: Nech vaše sviatky, žiaria a trblietajú.
phrases.transliteration: Nech vase sviatky, ziaria a trblietaju.

phrases.english: Listen to your body, it knows.
A curious cat, exploring the garden.
The dog barks, a happy sound.
The fish swim, in clear water.
Do you have, any local honey?
Where can I find, baked goods?
Moss grows soft, on ancient stone.
phrases.slovak: Mach rastie jemne, na starobný kameň.
phrases.transliteration: Makh ras-tyeh yemm-neh, nah sta-ro-bny ka-men.

phrases.english: Birds sing bright, dawn's gentle light.
Roots dig deep, secrets they keep.
Build your Slovak, word by word.
Discover Slovak, one phrase at a time.
phrases.slovak: Objavuj slovenčinu, jednu frázu po druhej.
phrases.transliteration: Objavuy slovenchinu, yednu frazu po druhey.
Priy mi vizvu, nauch sa slovenchinu.

phrases.slovak: Slnko stúpa pomaly, deň sa rozvíja.
phrases.transliteration: Slunko stoo-pah poh-mah-lyoo, deny sah roz-vee-yah.

phrases.slovak: Ročné obdobia sa menia, prírody rytmus.
phrases.transliteration: Roch-nyah ob-doh-bee-yah sah men-yah, pree-roh-dee rit-moos.

phrases.slovak: Keď si unavený, oddýchni, potom vstaň.
phrases.transliteration: Keď si unavený, oddýchni, potom vstaň.

phrases.slovak: Skontroluj správy, spoj sa so svetom.
phrases.transliteration: Skontroluj správy, spoj sa so svetom.

phrases.english: My family, a treasure, I cherish.

phrases.slovak: Pýtaj sa všetko, uč sa hlboko.
phrases.transliteration: Pi-tay sa vshyet-ko, uch sa hlub-o-ko.

phrases.english: Savor this quiet, moment. Feel its peace.
phrases.slovak: Vychutnaj si tento tichý, moment. Cíť jeho pokoj.
phrases.transliteration: Vychutnay si tento tichyy, moment. Cíť jeho pokoj.

phrases.english: Open your senses, to the now. What do you see?
phrases.slovak: Otvor svoje zmysly, prítomnosti. Čo vidíš?
phrases.transliteration: Otvor svoje zmysly, prítomnosti. Čo vidíš?

phrases.english: Let go, of what was. Embrace, what is.
phrases.slovak: Pusť to, čo bolo. Prijmi, čo je.
phrases.transliteration: Pusť to, čo bolo. Prijmi, čo je.

phrases.english: Your inner landscape, is vast. Explore it gently.
phrases.slovak: Tvoja vnútorná krajina, je obrovská. Jemne ju preskúmaj.
phrases.transliteration: Tvoja vnútorná krajina, je obrovská. Jemne ju preskúmaj.

phrases.english: Feel the rhythm, of your own being. Deep and steady.
phrases.slovak: Cíť rytmus, svojej vlastnej existencie. Hlboký a stály.
phrases.transliteration: Cíť rytmus, svojej vlastnej existencie. Hlboký a stály.

phrases.slovak: Štyri ročné obdobia, menia sa rýchlo.
phrases.transliteration: SHTIH-reeh ROCH-nah yeh-OB-doh-bee-ah, MEY-nee-ah sah REEH-kloh.

phrases.english: Joy is found, in simple things.

phrases.slovak: Pýtaj sa všetko, uč sa hlbšie.
phrases.transliteration: Pýtaj sa všetko, uč sa hlbšie.

phrases.english: My favorite t-shirt, is this one.

phrases.slovak: Učte sa po slovensky, otvorte svety.
phrases.transliteration: Uch-teh sah poh slo-ven-skee, ot-vor-teh sve-tee.

phrases.slovak: Hovorte po slovensky, cíťte sa živo.
phrases.transliteration: Ho-vor-teh poh slo-ven-skee, tsee-teh sah zhee-vo.

phrases.english: Embrace the sounds, master the flow.
Offer a small gift, of your time.
Whisper a kind word, when needed.
Hold a door open, for another.

phrases.slovak: AI sníva vo veľkom, myslí hlboko.
phrases.transliteration: Ey-ai snyee-vah vo vehl-kom, mi-sleee hlub-o-ko.

phrases.english: See the opening, make the pass.
Heart of a lion, spirit of a warrior.
Anticipate the move, control the flow.
Think in Slovak, feel the rhythm.
Explore Slovak culture, one word at a time.
phrases.slovak: Spoznajte slovenskú kultúru, jedno slovo za čas.
phrases.transliteration: Spoznajte slovensku kulturu, jedno slovo za cas.

phrases.slovak: Hovorte po slovensky, spojte sa hlboko.
phrases.transliteration: Hovorte po slovensky, spojte sa hlboko.

phrases.english: Speak the word, feel the rhythm.
Sound it out, syllable by syllable.
Connect the sounds, make a sentence.
I need, a place to rest.
My passport, I can't find it.
Anchor your heart, in this moment.

phrases.slovak: Rozšír sa von, zúž sa dovnútra.
phrases.transliteration: Rozshir sa von, zúzh sa dovnútra.

phrases.english: Give it a shot, why not?
His foot, it taps the beat.
He's, my neighbor, across the street.
phrases.slovak: Je môj sused, oproti cez ulicu.
phrases.transliteration: Yey moy soo-sed, o-pro-tee tsez oo-lee-tsu.

phrases.english: We are, old acquaintances, from school.
He's, my mentor, a great guide.
Let your spirit, guide you onward.
phrases.slovak: Nech tvoj duch, ťa vedie ďalej.
phrases.transliteration: Nech tvoj duch, ťa ve-die d'a-ley.

phrases.english: Could I have, a doggy bag?
phrases.slovak: Mohol by som dostať, krabičku na zvyšky?
phrases.transliteration: Mo-hol by som dos-tat, kra-bič-ku na zvyš-ky?

phrases.english: Build fluency, one word at a time.
Let your voice be heard, in Slovak.
phrases.slovak: Nech je tvoj hlas počuť, po slovensky.
phrases.transliteration: Nech je tvoj hlas pochuť, po slovensky.

phrases.english: Embrace the challenge, find your rhythm.
Think in Slovak, dream in Slovak.
phrases.slovak: Mysli po slovensky, snívaj po slovensky.
phrases.transliteration: Mysli po slovensky, snivay po slovensky.

phrases.english: Let's get this done, right now.

phrases.slovak: Toto, je presne ako malo byť.
phrases.transliteration: Toto, je presne ako malo byť.

phrases.english: My brother, my partner in crime.
Offer warmth, like a soft blanket.
Lift spirits, with a cheerful tune.
Be a calm harbor, for a tired soul.
phrases.slovak: Buď pokojný prístav, pre unavenú dušu.
phrases.transliteration: Buď po-koj-ný prís-tav, pre u-na-ve-nú du-šu.

phrases.english: Share a gentle word, when skies are grey.
phrases.slovak: Zdieľaj jemné slovo, keď obloha je šedivá.
phrases.transliteration: Zdie-ľaj jem-né slo-vo, keď o-blo-ha je še-di-vá.

phrases.english: Move with the ball, feel the ground.
phrases.slovak: Pohybuj sa s loptou, cíť zem.
phrases.transliteration: Pohybuy sa s loptou, cit zem.

phrases.english: See the space, take the chance.

phrases.slovak: Každý krok má význam, uč sa.
phrases.transliteration: Kazhdy krok ma vyznam, uch sa.

phrases.english: Flow like water, hit like thunder.
phrases.slovak: Teč ako voda, udri ako hrom.
phrases.transliteration: Tech ako voda, udri ako hrom.

phrases.english: The best flowers, bloom in their season.

phrases.slovak: Múdrosť prichádza, s mnohými východmi slnka.
phrases.transliteration: Moo-drost preech-kha-dza, s mnoh-ee-mee vee-kho-dmi sln-ka.

phrases.english: A strong tree, grows deep roots.
phrases.slovak: Silný strom, rastie s hlbokými koreňmi.
phrases.transliteration: Sil-nee strom, ras-tyeh s hlb-oh-kee-mee ko-ren-yee.

phrases.slovak: Okno je jasné, čaká nový deň.
phrases.transliteration: Okno ye yasne, chaka novy den.

phrases.english: Toast is ready, butter it up.
Out the door, greet the street.

phrases.slovak: Lúčne kvety kvitnú, na šírych lúkach.
phrases.transliteration: Looch-nye kvyet-y kvit-noo, na shee-reekh loo-kakh.

phrases.slovak: Kvapky dažďa padajú, zem pije zhlboka.
phrases.transliteration: Kvap-ky daž-dya pa-da-yoo, zem pyee-ye zhlo-boh-ka.
